name: IRON CREEK LAKE CAMPGROUND AND STORE

violations.description: Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. -Four packages of patty hamburgers are open air thawing at counter top.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — ---Sani Bucket found at 50ppm Chlorine. *Maintain at 100ppm solution.--Sanitizer solution for three compartment sink was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Sani sink found at 100ppm chlorine. *Maintain at 50ppm Chlorine solution.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Staff used hand sink to rinse blender pitcher.
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
